title: Walksy's Mod Folder
description: My Mod Folder - Made for Crystal PvP
body:
Walksy's Crystal PvP Mod Folder!

My crystal pvp mod folder, featuring FPS optimizations along with useful crystal pvp mods including all of my custom mods: - [Shield Status](https://modrinth.com/mod/shield-statuses) - [Shield Fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/complete-shield-fixes) - [No Death Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-death-animation) - [Client Kits](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-kits) - [Crosshair Addons](https://modrinth.com/mod/crosshair-addons-public) - [Ambience V2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambience-v2) I have no affiliation with any of the other mods inside this mod pack. ---
